students.name: Cassidy
students.studentUnderstandings: Cassidy participated in group tutoring today. Cassidy made connections between fractions and whole numbers, showing an understanding of denominators and how many parts make a whole. Cassidy practiced identifying fractions on a number line and engaged in discussions about the reasoning behind fraction placement.

students.name: Bristol
students.studentUnderstandings: Bristol participated in group tutoring today. Bristol worked on understanding fractions on a number line, exploring how many parts make a whole. Bristol practiced explaining reasoning and collaborated on placing and labeling fractions such as halves and fourths on a number line.

students.name: Leighton
students.studentUnderstandings: Leighton participated in group tutoring today. Leighton shared ideas about using shapes to partition number lines into equal pieces. Leighton practiced identifying denominators and counting fractional jumps, contributing to group discussion and problem-solving for fractions on a number line.
